title: Threshold for the Requirement To Collect, Retain, and Transmit Information on Funds Transfers and Transmittals of Funds
abstract: The Financial Crimes Enforcement Network (FinCEN) of the Department of the Treasury (Treasury) and the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Board) are reviewing the threshold in the rule requiring banks and nonbank financial institutions to collect and retain information on funds transfers and transmittals of funds. FinCEN is reviewing the threshold in the rule requiring banks and nonbank financial institutions to transmit information on funds transfers and transmittals of funds. Th
action: Joint advance notice of proposed rulemaking (Advance Notice).
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
